tasks.subject: Task 1: Parser fallback + isSimpleCopy flag (+ regression suite)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** parseModifiers resolves simple-format mod sections via a guarded, rollback-safe fallback, sets item.isSimpleCopy, and a test suite proves simple == extended trade IDs with no regression.

**Files:**
- Modify: renderer/src/parser/ParsedItem.ts (add isSimpleCopy?: boolean)
- Modify: renderer/src/parser/Parser.ts (add isSimpleCopyFormat + parseSimpleModLines; fallback at the parseModifiers bail ~1254)
- Create: renderer/specs/web/simple-copy.test.ts
- Delete: renderer/specs/web/chat-simple-copy.experiment.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- simple ring == extended trade IDs/values, isSimpleCopy true
- extended ring unchanged, flag off
- charm flag mods resolve, no flavor pollution
- helmet per-line types + coalesced rolls + armourEV 692
- extended charm gate holds

**Verify:** cd renderer && npx vitest run specs/web/simple-copy.test.ts && npm run check-types

```json:metadata
{"files": ["renderer/src/parser/ParsedItem.ts", "renderer/src/parser/Parser.ts", "renderer/specs/web/simple-copy.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd renderer && npx vitest run specs/web/simple-copy.test.ts && npm run check-types", "acceptanceCriteria": ["simple ring == extended trade IDs/values, isSimpleCopy true", "extended ring unchanged, flag off", "charm flag mods resolve, no flavor pollution", "helmet per-line types + coalesced rolls + armourEV 692", "extended charm gate holds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Filter seeding — keep fill % for simple copies
tasks.description:
**Goal:** For item.isSimpleCopy, stat-filter fill applies searchStatRange % to the rolled value instead of collapsing to exact value (skip tier-floor clamp).

**Files:**
- Modify: renderer/src/web/price-check/filters/create-stat-filters.ts (clamp sites ~331-332 and ~534-535)
- Modify: renderer/specs/web/simple-copy.test.ts (add seeding test)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- simple ring # to maximum Life (90) at fill 20% -> default.min === 72
- with isSimpleCopy false, default.min === 90

**Verify:** cd renderer && npx vitest run specs/web/simple-copy.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["renderer/src/web/price-check/filters/create-stat-filters.ts", "renderer/specs/web/simple-copy.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd renderer && npx vitest run specs/web/simple-copy.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["simple fill: default.min===72 (90-20%)", "non-simple clamped: default.min===90"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Limited-data badge on price-check widget
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When item.isSimpleCopy, show a small notice above the filters explaining limited data.

**Files:**
- Modify: renderer/src/web/price-check/CheckedItem.vue (template; v-if="item.isSimpleCopy" banner after <filter-name>, t() with English text via fallbackFormat)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- isSimpleCopy===true -> banner renders
- no banner for extended items

**Verify:** cd renderer && npm run check-types && npm run lint; manual overlay check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["renderer/src/web/price-check/CheckedItem.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd renderer && npm run check-types && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["banner shows when isSimpleCopy", "no banner for extended items"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Full quality gates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm the whole renderer suite + gates are green.

**Files:** none (verification only)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- check-types, lint, test all pass
- format leaves changed files clean

**Verify:** cd renderer && npm run check-types && npm run lint && npm run format && npm test

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "cd renderer && npm run check-types && npm run lint && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["check-types passes", "lint passes", "test passes", "format clean"]}
```
